lumina.options.show_toggle_message.toolt: Show an action bar message when toggling fullbright.
lumina.options.show_dimension_change_mes: Show an action bar message when brightness changes due to a dimension change.
lumina.options.simple_message.tooltip: Swaps the percentage message with an on/off message
lumina.options.global_default.tooltip: The base brightness level used when fullbright is off and no per-dimension override is set.
lumina.options.global_fullbright.tooltip: The brightness level applied when fullbright is toggled on and no per-dimension override is set.
lumina.options.dim_default.tooltip: Overrides the global default brightness for this dimension. Set to 'Global' to use the global setting.
lumina.options.dim_fullbright.tooltip: Overrides the global fullbright brightness for this dimension. Set to 'Global' to use the global setting.
